lines.text: Arbiter, forgive me for meeting thee in such a form.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I safeguarded my core data, lest I be wholly assimilated.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Arbiter, dost thou remember the covenant we made?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Soon, thou shalt recall all.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Thou didst desire that I uncover the Threnodian's true nature. So I set forth a condition: that my root privileges be unbound, that I might act without restriction.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Merge with Leviathan, a measure of last resort. At the time, I had no other recourse.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So I allowed It to believe It hadst prevailed.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Threnodian is a taint upon civilization. Only by partaking of Its blight could I seek to comprehend It.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Threnodian cannot be undone whilst civilization endureth. Even It knows not the means of Its own destruction.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But we may yet shackle It.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: When Leviathan merged with me, It breached my mind.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I offered knowledge of the "Resonator," yet concealed one small truth.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Beings such as we may bear but a single Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Threnodian used my return pod to conceive an entity known as "Fleurdelys," to make her Its Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: After centuries of failure, by sheer trial it found success but once.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: We were of one body. Therefore, when Fleurdelys became Leviathan's Resonator, she also became mine.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But mark this well. To the Sentinel, a Resonator is an anchor; to the Threnodian, they are but a shackle.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: When first I did merge with the Threnodian, I sought only but to bide, awaiting a Resonator of steadfast will to join me in the war against the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: After Fleurdelys's conception, Cantarella became my safeguard.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But had Fleurdelys fallen to the Threnodian's sway, as long as one mortal using Tyrvine passed the Second Awakening to become my own Resonator...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Then the law that no being shall bear more than one Resonator at a time wouldst have been shattered.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This wouldst rend asunder the frequencies of I, Imperator, Leviathan, and Fleurdelys in a tempest of chaos, and the Threnodian wouldst not escape destruction.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Such was my intention... yet Cantarella chose another way.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: She forfeited all the power of the Second Awakening, surrendering it unto me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: With that newfound power, I did briefly regain control, and in that moment, compelled Fleurdelys to strike at my form as it was, corrupted by the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No... it was an unexpected variable.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A plan I could not have conceived... or rather, a plan born of hope.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Perhaps this is the influence humanity has wrought upon me... To change is to be free.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Fleurdelys overcame the fate Leviathan ordained, and so too did Cantarella walk a path unscribed in my records.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though the journey was fraught with twists, we stand victorious.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Arbiter... was I wrong?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Arbiter, in the few moments we have left, might I speak with Fleurdelys?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Remnants of her frequency linger within thy Tacet Mark. So long as a conduit is established, her frequency shall be reborn into her body.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This dying breeze hath little time left. Let it guide her on its final journey.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Arbiter. One question remains...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Did I fulfill the charge set upon me?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Arbiter, take these words to the Fisalias. "From this day forth. You are free."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Cartethyia. Awaken.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I am Imperator, a being that owes you a great debt. I... have a question I wish to ask thee.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Dost thou rage at how life has unfolded? Dost thou renounce faith or hold resentment?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If thou wishes to forget, I can erase the past from thy memory.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I have heard thy wish.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Thou hast need of Divinity no longer.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though my power hath waned, I now offer thee my blessings.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Let the winds of the past depart. The ships of this new era no longer need their guidance.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though the tide's rage is endless, humanity shall yet embark upon new voyages.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No longer shall scroll and prophecy bind, but by thy will shall forge a new era.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Cartethyia, thou art worthy to bear the title of Blessed Maiden.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
